name: test/multi-prefix-wrapper
_comment: 0.11.0 multi-prefix test fixture. Declares TWO PSR-4 prefixes; the engine must probe both and prefer the contract-implementing candidate (MultiPrefixLate) over the non-implementing one (MultiPrefixEarly). installPath points at this Wrappers root so both BoostWrapper class files resolve under it for the package-scope file-path check.
